name: Full Body Strength
description: Intermediate A/B full body program. Compound-heavy with machine accessories. 3x/week alternating workouts.

weeks.description: Introductory week with lower intensity to get familiar with workouts.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Bar stays close to legs. Stop when you feel a deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

weeks.name: Deload
